use_cases: Product review ratings in e-commerce storefronts
Customer satisfaction scoring in survey forms
Content quality ratings in media platforms
User feedback collection in SaaS dashboards
Service or provider evaluation in review systems
ai_summary: A lightweight, interactive star rating component built with lucide-react icons and Tailwind CSS. Supports three size variants, configurable rating scales, and both interactive and readonly modes with smooth hover scale transitions. Designed for collecting user ratings and feedback across e-commerce, SaaS, and media applications.
